name: About Us (with page widgets)

content_html:
About Us

We are a team of engineers building the next generation of subscription platforms.
_import_note: This page demonstrates page-defined widgets (Sprint 19). The 'page_widget_assignments' array assigns a widget to the footer area, overriding the layout's default footer widget. The widget_slug must reference an existing widget.
